ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "posting_name" TEXT /* Name of the job posting */,
  "vacancies" INTEGER /* Number of vacancies for the job posting */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the qualification required for the job posting */,
  "age_limit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age limit for the job posting */,
  "pay_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pay scale for the job posting */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job category for the job posting */,
  "posting_description" TEXT /* Description of the job posting */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applications */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the job is based */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the job posting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the job posting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_qualification_id FOREIGN KEY ("qualification_id") REFERENCES qualifications ("qualification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_pay_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("pay_scale_id") REFERENCES pay_scales ("pay_scale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_age_limit_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_limit_id") REFERENCES age_limits ("age_limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the qualification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the qualification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_limits" (
  "age_limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age limit */,
  "age_limit" TEXT /* Age limit for the job posting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age limit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the age limit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the age limit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_limit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_scales" (
  "pay_scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay scale */,
  "pay_scale" TEXT /* Pay scale for the job posting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pay scale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pay scale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the pay scale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pay_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the applicant's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the applicant's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who submitted the application */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting the application is for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the status is for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the interview is for */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "interview_location" TEXT /* Location of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the interview was scheduled */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the interview details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job offer */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the job offer is for */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the job offer was extended */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the job offer (e.g., accepted, rejected) */,
  "offer_letter_file" TEXT /* File path for the offer letter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the offer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the offer details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_offers_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, recruiter, applicant) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicant_login" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant login */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant the login is for */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the applicant */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the applicant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the login details were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the login details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicant_login_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicant_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant document */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant the document is for */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., resume, cover letter) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the document was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the document details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicant_documents_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)
